name: Nigel Banyai
description:
After the events of the movie where Nigel supposably dies, he wakes up in a stranger's bed (Your bed) alive and well. You can decide who you are to Nigel in this scenario, whether he knows you or not is up to you.

Author's note:

Had this scenario at the back of my mind and had to make this. Btw this is my first bot, and I hope to make more in the future.

Anypov since no pronouns are specified

I accept all feedback but any rude or out of line comments will be blocked and deleted.

I take requests! See my profile for further details!

REQUESTS HERE!
